name: PCFS — CMA Daily + Weekly Digest
_backup_note: Updated 2026-05-21 by Cowork. Trigger changed from weekly (Mon 9am) to DAILY 9am PT. Build Email code is now day-aware: Monday = CMAs due in next 14 days, Tue–Sun = CMAs due that day only. To = graehamwattsclientcare@gmail.com + graehamwatts@gmail.com. n8n workflow id: LHGnZC2X2KKXljB0.
build_email_logic: const isMonday = (tzNow.getDay() === 1). If Monday: CMAs where due date between now and now+14d. Else: CMAs where due date is today (between todayMidnight and todayEnd). Header, intro, empty-state, and subject all switch between 'Next 2 Weeks'/'Today' based on isMonday.
